title: Aporum nycteridoglossum
taxonomy: Aporum nycteridoglossum is a species of orchid native to New Guinea. It belongs to the family Orchidaceae, which is the largest family of flowering plants. The genus Aporum is a group of epiphytic orchids, and Aporum nycteridoglossum is one of its species. This orchid species is characterized by its unique flowers and growth habit, making it a distinct member of the Orchidaceae family. Further classification of Aporum nycteridoglossum may include its order (Asparagales) and its subfamily ( Epidendroideae).
